About

Intro

In an unprecedented display of unity and determination, we, the $nitefeeder community, have taken matters into our own hands, marking the beginning of a new era with a community takeover. This isn't just a rebound; it's a declaration that we are stronger than ever before. Our collective spirit and unwavering resolve are the bedrock upon which we will build the future of $nitefeeder.


Community

Gone are the days of uncertainty and broken promises left by the original creators. The scammers have been purged, holding no tokens, no influence, no power. In their place, a vibrant, dedicated community stands ready to steer this project towards uncharted territories of success and innovation.


$NITEFEEDER
